title: Zip witn 6 String Toy for Pets, Glow in The Dark Rope Launcher Cat and Dog Toys (6PC Single Rope)
features: 【Safe And Portable】Our rope launcher features advanced safety protocols for worry-free play. Its compact design is easy to carry, and the USB-C port ensures it’s always ready for action, so you can enjoy fun anytime, anywhere.

【Effortless String Replacement】With One replacement strings included, it’s easy to attach to glow-in-the-dark toys. Suitable for kids and adults, it offers seamless compatibility and durable materials for extended playtime.

【Innovative and Fun】This glow-in-the-dark rope launcher combines physics with technology for an exciting experience. The glowing rope floats in the night sky, creating various shapes as you wave your hands, sparking curiosity.

【Easy to Use】Simply open the cover, insert the rope, and hold the button for 3-4 seconds until the blue light turns on to power the device. Our electric rope launcher propels the rope high into the air, offering interactive fun suitable for all ages.

【Must-Have Gift for All Ages】Kids love it, teens can't put it down, and adults are equally captivated. This toy makes the perfect gift for holidays, birthdays, or just because, bringing joy to everyone, regardless of age.
description: Product description Experience endless fun! Six replacement ropes for seamless play.
